name: Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease Diagnosis Codes
description: Broad ICD-10-CM code set for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) including COPD with acute infection, COPD with acute exacerbation, emphysema subtypes, and unspecified COPD. Used in COPD management, pharmacotherapy, and spirometry quality measures. Note: VS_COPD_EXACERBATION_ICD10 also exists with a narrower set focused only on acute exacerbation events (J44.0, J44.1).
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with (acute) lower respiratory infection
Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with (acute) exacerbation
Mixed simple and mucopurulent chronic bronchitis
Bronchiectasis with acute lower respiratory infection
